description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly white and green color scheme. The front and back faces display the words 'FRESH MILK' in bold white letters against a green background, with a white splash graphic suggesting a liquid product. The top of the carton features a green screw cap, positioned slightly off-center, which serves as the opening mechanism. The carton has crisp, folded edges and a flat base, allowing it to stand upright on flat surfaces. The material appears to be laminated cardboard or Tetra Pak, commonly used for liquid packaging, with a glossy finish that reflects light. There are no visible illustrations or images indicating a specific juice flavor, and no nutritional information panel is visible on any side.
description: A white and green rectangular juice carton with a green screw cap and 'FRESH MILK' text on the front and back. The surface is glossy with a splash graphic, and the packaging is typical of Tetra Pak-style cartons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FRESH MILK' label, green splash graphic, and the green screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the folded carton edge, partial splash graphic, and the cap's position near the top corner.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with 'FRESH MILK' text and the cap visible on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the folded edge and splash graphic, with the cap visible from the side.
